allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json"\) { Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json" | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty enabledPlugins -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "No settings.json found" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Plugin: $\($_.Name\)"; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  Command: $\($_.Name\)" } })
